inputs.fcf_source: Mid-cycle owner cash: between FY2024 ops CF/sh $2.266 and FY2025 $4.197 (EX-99.1); haircut from peak gold/silver prices
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 record $4.197/sh operating cash flow reflects cycle-high metal prices; base uses ~$3.00/sh sustainable owner cash

bear.notes: Metal prices mean-revert; Antamina integration slower

base.notes: Portfolio growth from PMPA pipeline; mid-cycle metal prices

bull.notes: Sustained precious-metal strength + new stream deliveries

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Streaming contracts and investments carried per IFRS; not land-at-cost pattern

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / pipeline streams?
option_scan.evidence: 40-F / AIF: PMPA portfolio with mines under construction; growth in Lawrence base cites pipeline, not separate terminal

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Asset-light model; no material loss drag segment in FY2025 EX-99.1

option_scan.question: Backlog not in cash path?
option_scan.evidence: Antamina silver stream ($4.3B consideration per 40-F) ramps in production mix; not separate option row

option_scan.question: Private stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Public streaming company; no holdco-style opaque sleeves

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Regular dividend $0.66/sh FY2025; not yield-curve setup

option_scan.question: Embedded option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: FY2025 revenue $2.3B driven by higher gold/silver prices (EX-99.1); commodity lever already in owner-cash normalization

growth_explanation.mechanism: New PMPA deliveries (including Antamina) and attributable GEO growth; partially offset if metal prices revert from 2025 peaks
growth_explanation.base_growth_source: [Assumption] mid-cycle: 6% years 1-5 from portfolio ramp, not peak $4.20/sh cash flow

synthesis.note: Marvin floor only until third-party sources indexed
